metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Three-level product brick map for the Public Cloud Services domain.

rootGroups.name: Infrastructure Services
rootGroups.description: Elastic compute, storage, networking, and resilience primitives.

subGroups.name: Compute and Acceleration
subGroups.description: Runtime capacity services that decide workload placement, isolation, elasticity, and accelerator availability for application and AI teams.

bricks.name: Virtual Machine Compute
bricks.description: Elastic VM families, machine images, placement, capacity reservations, autoscaling, and lifecycle operations for general-purpose, enterprise, and regulated workloads.

internalModules.title: Instance lifecycle control plane
internalModules.description: Provisions, starts, stops, resizes, and retires VM instances while preserving tenancy, quota, and placement constraints.

internalModules.title: Image and template catalog
internalModules.description: Maintains hardened images, bootstrap scripts, patch baselines, and customer-approved templates.

internalModules.title: Autoscaling and capacity placement
internalModules.description: Balances scale policies, availability zones, reservations, and spot or preemptible capacity for workload demand.

interfaces.title: Compute provisioning API
interfaces.description: Creates and manages VM instances, images, placement groups, launch templates, and capacity reservations.

interfaces.title: Instance metadata and bootstrap service
interfaces.description: Provides instance identity, configuration, secrets references, and bootstrapping data to running workloads.

interfaces.title: Console instance manager
interfaces.description: Operator and developer UI for lifecycle, diagnostics, resize, snapshot, and recovery actions.

brickDependencies.description: Uses Identity and Access Management capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Virtual Networking capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Monitoring and Observability capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses FinOps and Commercial Controls capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.interface: image import and golden image publishing
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes customer-approved images, patch baselines, and bootstrap artifacts.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Provision and manage fleets for applications, batch jobs, and enterprise systems.

dataDependencies.description: Tracks instance, image, placement, reservation, quota, and lifecycle state.
Publishes instance-hours, storage attachment, accelerator, and reservation consumption.
Publishes administrative and lifecycle API events.

operatingMetrics.name: cost signal coverage
operatingMetrics.unit: % usage with allocation and anomaly visibility

bricks.name: Container and Kubernetes Platform
bricks.description: Managed container runtime, registry integration, cluster lifecycle, workload scheduling, service discovery, and policy integration for Kubernetes and containerized apps.

internalModules.title: Cluster lifecycle manager
internalModules.description: Creates, upgrades, repairs, and scales control planes and worker pools across zones and regions.

internalModules.title: Workload scheduler integration
internalModules.description: Maps pods, services, jobs, ingress, and node policies onto compute, network, and identity primitives.

internalModules.title: Registry and supply-chain connector
internalModules.description: Connects image registries, provenance checks, vulnerability scanning, and deployment admission controls.

interfaces.title: Cluster management API
interfaces.description: Manages clusters, node pools, versions, add-ons, and operational policies.

interfaces.title: Kubernetes-compatible workload API
interfaces.description: Exposes workload scheduling and service APIs to application teams and platform automation.

interfaces.title: Container operations console
interfaces.description: Shows cluster health, workloads, events, upgrades, and policy findings.

brickDependencies.description: Uses Virtual Machine Compute capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Virtual Networking capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Identity and Access Management capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Secrets and Configuration capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Monitoring and Observability capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Threat Detection and Posture capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses FinOps and Commercial Controls capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Consumes application images and supply-chain metadata.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Deploy containerized workloads and reconcile desired state.

dataDependencies.description: Stores cluster, namespace, workload, deployment, image, and service metadata.
Publishes node, pod, service, and cluster inventory.
Publishes administrative, deployment, and policy events.

operatingMetrics.name: cost signal coverage
operatingMetrics.unit: % usage with allocation and anomaly visibility

bricks.name: Accelerated Compute
bricks.description: GPU, TPU, custom accelerator, high-performance networking, quota, reservation, and capacity allocation services for AI training, inference, and technical computing.

internalModules.title: Accelerator capacity broker
internalModules.description: Allocates scarce accelerator inventory across reservations, queues, priority classes, and regions.

internalModules.title: AI cluster fabric manager
internalModules.description: Coordinates high-throughput networking, storage attachment, drivers, and topology-aware placement.

internalModules.title: Accelerator quota and utilization analytics
internalModules.description: Tracks quota, usage, idle capacity, job efficiency, and commitment utilization.

interfaces.title: Accelerator provisioning API
interfaces.description: Requests accelerator-backed instances, clusters, reservations, quotas, and topology constraints.

interfaces.title: Capacity reservation and quota console
interfaces.description: Shows regional availability, reservation status, quota requests, and utilization.

interfaces.title: Training and inference telemetry stream
interfaces.description: Publishes accelerator utilization, throttling, memory, and job efficiency metrics.

brickDependencies.description: Uses Virtual Machine Compute capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Virtual Networking capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Object Storage capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Monitoring and Observability capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Receives training and inference jobs that consume accelerator capacity.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Use capacity and commitment signals for AI budget planning.

Publishes accelerator-hours, reservation usage, and under-utilization signals.
Publishes quota, reservation, and provisioning events.

operatingMetrics.unit: % usage with allocation and anomaly visibility

subGroups.name: Storage and Data Movement
subGroups.description: Persistent data, edge distribution, lifecycle, replication, and transfer services that underpin durability and global performance.

bricks.name: Object Storage
bricks.description: Durable object storage with buckets, lifecycle policy, versioning, replication, encryption, access controls, event notifications, and data lake integration.

internalModules.title: Bucket and object namespace
internalModules.description: Manages buckets, objects, metadata, versioning, retention, and access boundaries.

internalModules.title: Lifecycle and replication engine
internalModules.description: Executes tiering, deletion, replication, legal hold, and cross-region continuity policies.

internalModules.title: Object event and lake integration
internalModules.description: Publishes object events and integrates storage with analytics, AI, and backup workflows.

interfaces.title: Object storage API
interfaces.description: Stores, retrieves, lists, versions, and deletes objects through SDKs and compatible protocols.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle policy console
interfaces.description: Configures retention, tiering, replication, object lock, and access policies.

interfaces.title: Object event stream
interfaces.description: Emits object-created, object-deleted, replication, and lifecycle events.

brickDependencies.description: Uses Identity and Access Management capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.
Uses Key Management and Encryption capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.

Uses Cloud Governance and Policy capabilities for governed public-cloud delivery.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Read and write backup, archive, and compliance objects.

dataDependencies.description: Tracks buckets, prefixes, policies, replication state, and storage classes.
Publishes storage volume, request, retrieval, replication, and transfer usage.
Publishes bucket, object, and access policy events.

operatingMetrics.name: cost signal coverage
operatingMetrics.unit: % usage with allocation and anomaly visibility

bricks.name: Block and File Storage
bricks.description: Low-latency block volumes and managed file systems with snapshots, encryption, resizing, performance tiers, shared access, and enterprise workload support.

internalModules.title: Volume and file system manager
internalModules.description: Creates, attaches, resizes, snapshots, and retires block volumes and file systems.

internalModules.title: Performance tier controller
internalModules.description: Manages IOPS, throughput, burst credits, caching, and workload-specific storage classes.

internalModules.title: Snapshot and clone engine
internalModules.description: Coordinates crash-consistent snapshots, clones, copy, retention, and recovery workflows.

interfaces.title: Block volume API
interfaces.description: Manages volumes, attachments, snapshots, clones, encryption, and performance settings.

interfaces.title: Managed file system API
interfaces.description: Creates and operates shared file systems, mounts, access rules, and throughput modes.

interfaces.title: Storage performance telemetry
interfaces.description: Publishes latency, IOPS, throughput, queue depth, and capacity metrics.

operatingMetrics.unit: % usage with allocation and anomaly visibility

bricks.name: CDN and Edge Delivery
bricks.description: Global edge caching, content delivery, TLS termination, origin shielding, traffic acceleration, bot controls, and edge routing for web and API workloads.

internalModules.title: Edge distribution manager
internalModules.description: Configures distributions, origins, cache behaviors, invalidations, TLS certificates, and regional edge caches.

internalModules.title: Cache and origin optimization
internalModules.description: Manages cache keys, compression, shielding, request coalescing, and origin failover behavior.

internalModules.title: Edge security integration
internalModules.description: Applies WAF, bot, DDoS, certificate, and geo-policy controls at the edge.

interfaces.title: CDN distribution API
interfaces.description: Creates and configures edge distributions, origins, cache policies, TLS, and invalidations.

interfaces.title: Edge logs and real-time metrics stream
interfaces.description: Publishes request, cache, latency, threat, and origin health events.

interfaces.title: Edge operations console
interfaces.description: UI for cache behavior, invalidation, certificate status, and traffic analytics.

subGroups.name: Networking and Resilience
subGroups.description: Connectivity, routing, traffic steering, recovery, and failover services that make cloud workloads reachable and resilient.

bricks.name: Virtual Networking
bricks.description: Virtual private cloud, subnet, routing, firewall, DNS, peering, private endpoint, VPN, and dedicated connectivity controls for isolated cloud networking.

internalModules.title: Network segmentation control plane
internalModules.description: Manages VPCs, subnets, route tables, security groups, firewall policies, and network ACLs.

internalModules.title: Private connectivity broker
internalModules.description: Coordinates peering, private endpoints, VPN, direct connect, transit routing, and hybrid links.

internalModules.title: DNS and service discovery fabric
internalModules.description: Provides private DNS, resolver forwarding, service discovery, and endpoint naming controls.

interfaces.title: Virtual network API
interfaces.description: Creates VPCs, subnets, routes, firewalls, private endpoints, and connectivity attachments.

interfaces.title: Hybrid connectivity console
interfaces.description: Configures VPNs, dedicated links, transit gateways, and routing diagnostics.

interfaces.title: Network flow log stream
interfaces.description: Publishes accepted, rejected, and routed traffic observations for security and operations.

internalModules.title: Traffic policy evaluator

bricks.name: Backup and Disaster Recovery
bricks.description: Backup, snapshot, replication, recovery orchestration, vaulting, immutability, restore testing, and disaster recovery workflows for cloud and hybrid workloads.

internalModules.description: Defines protection policies, vaults, retention, immutability, encryption, and legal hold.

internalModules.title: Replication and recovery orchestrator
internalModules.description: Coordinates cross-region replication, recovery runbooks, dependency ordering, and failover tests.

internalModules.title: Restore validation engine
internalModules.description: Tests recoverability, RPO/RTO adherence, and backup integrity through scheduled drills.

interfaces.title: Backup and recovery API
interfaces.description: Configures policies, vaults, protected resources, replication, restores, and recovery plans.

interfaces.title: Recovery drill console
interfaces.description: Runs restore tests, failover exercises, dependency checks, and evidence exports.

interfaces.title: Recovery status event stream
interfaces.description: Publishes backup success, restore, replication lag, and drill evidence events.
